Off Calendar Sep-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Boyle for Raymond Kong (Trustee).

The Court stated that both properties were listed on schedule A and granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
